title: HetznerRoute
description: Manages a route added to an existing Hetzner Cloud Network via the add_route action.

networkId.description: ID of the Network to add the route to.

destination.description: Destination network or host of the route in CIDR notation (e.g. '10.100.1.0/24').

gateway.description: Gateway IP address for the route (e.g. '10.0.1.1'). Cannot be the first IP of the Network's ip_range or 172.31.1.1.
